title: Create: Stuff 'N Additions - Tank Fix (Spout, Curios & Upgrade)
description: Adds Spout filling, Curios slots, Immersive Aircraft, Furnace, and Sophisticated Core Tank Upgrade integration for Create SA Tanks on NeoForge 1.21.1.
body:
# Create: Stuff 'N Additions - Tank Fix
[![Modrinth](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.bypixel.dev%2Fraw%2F4dlsHJ.png&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-and-addition-tank-fix)
[![Curseforge](https://i.ibb.co/F4MtFnv7/cozy-64h.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-stuff-and-addition-tank-fix)
[![Github](https://i.ibb.co/DPnZdBK5/41dfe80a399c0c8466f8cecc9f35048de5066e11-1.png)](https://github.com/serverside-swzo/Create-Stuff-and-Addition-Tank-Fix)
[![Discord](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg&h=64)](https://discord.com/invite/nDhkgzAPR2)

[![GitHub issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/serverside-swzo/Create-Stuff-and-Addition-Tank-Fix.svg)](https://github.com/serverside-swzo/Create-Stuff-and-Addition-Tank-Fix/issues)
![Lines of Code](https://img.shields.io/endpoint?url=https://ghloc.vercel.app/api/serverside-swzo/Create-Stuff-and-Addition-Tank-Fix/badge&color=2ecc71)

A simple mod that fixes and adds integrations for the tanks from [Create: Stuff 'N Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-stuff-additions) for NeoForge 1.21.1.

## Features

* **Spout Filling:** Fixes the Create: SA tanks by registering NeoForge fluid capabilities, allowing them to be filled by Create's Spout, pipes, and other fluid-moving blocks (1000mb at a time).

* **Furnace Fuel:** Fueling Tanks (Lava) now function as reusable fuel sources. Instead of being consumed instantly, the tank remains in the fuel slot and "ticks down" its internal capacity.

* **Immersive Aircraft Integration:** Refuel your planes and gyrodynes! When placed in an aircraft's boiler/fuel slot.

* **Sophisticated Core Integration (Optional):** Adds full support for [Sophisticated Core's](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-core) Tank Upgrade. This feature is automatically enabled when Sophisticated Core is installed, allowing the upgrade to fill and drain Create: SA tanks at high speed inside [Sophisticated Storage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-storage) containers and [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks).

* **Curios Tank Slot:** Adds a custom "Tank" Curios slot, allowing the Create: SA tanks to be equipped as a bauble (if Curios is installed).
